title: Iran war: Households brace for cost of living pain as oil and gas prices surge
description: After the COVID pandemic, the war in the Ukraine, and the Liz Truss mini-budget, the Iran conflict represents yet another shock to the British economy.
content:
British households have been told to brace for a surge in inflation and multiple interest rate hikes this year after surging oil and gas prices sparked by Donald Trump's war on Iran.

title: Comic Relief to return with The Traitors, Amandaland and Idris Elba
description: The charity telethon takes place on Friday night and will be hosted by Davina McCall.
content:
Marcella star Anna Friel is to play Claudia Winkleman in a sketch for this year's Comic Relief, alongside some recent stars of The Traitors such as Rachel Duffy and Faraaz Noor.

title: Labour MPs threaten vote to show opposition to Mahmood's migration plans
description: Opponents are considering using parliamentary procedure to force a vote to highlight their concerns.
content:
Labour MPs opposed to the government's immigration reforms are threatening to expose the party's divisions by forcing a symbolic vote in Parliament unless ministers back down.

title: Natural History Museum most popular tourist attraction in 2025
description: The venue broke the record for the most visitors to any museum or gallery in a single year.
content:
The Natural History Museum was the UK's most popular tourist attraction in 2025, breaking the record for the most visitors to any museum or gallery in a single year.

title: Strait of Hormuz: Which ships are passing through?
description: Just under 100 ships have passed thorough the Strait of Hormuz since the start of March, according to data analysed by BBC Verify.
content:
Just under 100 ships have passed through the Strait of Hormuz since the start of March, according to data analysed by BBC Verify, despite periodic attacks on shipping in the area by Iranian forces.
